---
title: "Lecture 37 Quiz: Revision & Hands-on (Spring Core)"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-37.qmd) | [Week 12 Content](/content/week-12.qmd) | [Lab 9](/labs/lab-09.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 37 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Dependency Injection", "B. Inversion of Control", "C. Aspect-Oriented Programming", "D. Object Relational Mapping"]
question = "Question 1: Which concept means the framework controls object creation instead of application code calling `new` everywhere?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Field injection in all layers", "B. Constructor injection for mandatory dependencies", "C. Static utility methods for repository calls", "D. Creating service objects inside controller methods"]
question = "Question 2: Which DI style is preferred in Spring for testability and explicit dependencies?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Controller -> Repository -> Service -> Database", "B. Service -> Controller -> Repository -> Database", "C. Controller -> Service -> Repository -> Database", "D. Repository -> Service -> Controller -> Database"]
question = "Question 3: What is the correct layered flow for a typical Spring MVC request?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `@PostConstruct`", "B. `@PreDestroy`", "C. `@Autowired`", "D. `@Primary`"]
question = "Question 4: Which annotation is used for one-time setup after dependency injection is complete?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Multiple implementations of same interface without `@Qualifier`/`@Primary`", "B. Missing semicolon in Java file", "C. Using DTO classes in controllers", "D. Returning `ResponseEntity` from REST methods"]
question = "Question 5: A Spring app fails with an 'ambiguous bean' error. What is the most likely cause?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
